github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: Always state assumptions before implementing. Match existing code style. No features beyond what was asked. Every changed line must trace to the request.

github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Use Arrange-Act-Assert structure. One assertion per test. Test names describe behavior not implementation. Mock only at system boundaries (network, DB, filesystem). No shared mutable state between tests.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Review for: correctness (logic errors, edge cases), security (injection, auth gaps, secrets), performance (N+1, unbounded queries), maintainability (single responsibility, naming). Format each finding as [SEVERITY] Line N: issue → fix.

github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use conventional commits: feat: fix: chore: docs: refactor: test: perf: — imperative mood, 72 char subject line max, explain WHY not WHAT in body if needed.
